g.text: Result Set — SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 18
Filtered: Alice (age=15) and Carol (age=10) excluded by Le jump
Yellow header | WHERE fails: Le p2 JUMPS to PC 6, PC 5 bypassed
Green header | WHERE passes: Le falls through, PC 5 ResultRow fires
Le inversion | age>18 compiled as Le(<=): jump fires when NOT matching
Loop body | PC 2->3->4->(5)->6->2 executes once per B-tree slot
Next semantics| has_more=1: jump to p2=2 has_more=0: fall-through to Halt
Bytecode Program (vdbe.c:execute) — SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 18
PC 0 | OpenTable c0 | open read cursor 0 on 'users' B-tree
PC 1 | Rewind c0 p2=7 | seek first row; table empty->PC 7
PC 2 | Column c0 col=1 r1 | r1 = c0.column(age) <- HOT PATH
PC 4 | Le r1 p2=6 r2 | age<=18: JUMP to PC 6 (skip emit)
PC 5 | ResultRow r3 N | emit current row to result set
PC 6 | Next c0 p2=2 | advance cursor; has_more->PC 2
slot | rowid | col 0: name | col 1: age
Iteration 1 c0=slot 0 rowid=1 age=15 WHERE FAILS — SKIP
PC 3 | Integer | r2 = 18 OP_INTEGER p1=18 -> reg[r2]
PC 4 | Le | 15 <= 18: TRUE -> JUMP fires PC=6
PC 5 | BYPASSED | ResultRow never reached this iteration
jmp | -> PC 2 | Next p2=2 re-enter loop body
c0 | cursor slot | 1 (Bob row loaded next)
Iteration 2 c0=slot 1 rowid=2 age=25 WHERE PASSES — EMIT
PC 3 | Integer | r2 = 18 OP_INTEGER p1=18 -> reg[r2]
PC 4 | Le | 25 <= 18: FALSE -> no jump fall-through PC=5
PC 5 | ResultRow | emit (Bob, 25) -> result fputc row to output
jmp | -> PC 2 | Next p2=2 re-enter loop body
c0 | cursor slot | 2 (Carol row loaded next)
Iteration 3 c0=slot 2 rowid=3 age=10 WHERE FAILS + EOF
PC 3 | Integer | r2 = 18 OP_INTEGER p1=18 -> reg[r2]
PC 4 | Le | 10 <= 18: TRUE -> JUMP fires PC=6
PC 5 | BYPASSED | ResultRow never reached this iteration
PC 7 | Halt | Next p2=2 not taken (EOF): fall-through to Halt
out | rows emitted| 1 (total: 1 of 3 rows passed)
